napkinApiKey.title: Napkin AI API Key
napkinApiKey.description: Your Napkin AI API key from https://app.napkin.ai

napkinApiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
napkinApiBaseUrl.description: Custom Napkin AI API base URL (leave empty to use default)

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (ms)
pollingInterval.description: How often to check generation status in milliseconds

maxWaitTime.title: Max Wait Time (ms)
maxWaitTime.description: Maximum time to wait for visual generation in milliseconds

s3Bucket.title: S3 Bucket Name
s3Bucket.description: S3 bucket name for storing generated visuals. Enables S3 storage when set.

s3Region.title: S3 Region
s3Region.description: AWS region for the S3 bucket (e.g. us-east-1)

s3Prefix.title: S3 Key Prefix
s3Prefix.description: Optional path prefix for stored objects (e.g. napkin-visuals/)

s3Endpoint.title: S3 Endpoint URL
s3Endpoint.description: Custom endpoint for S3-compatible storage (e.g. Cloudflare R2, MinIO)

awsAccessKeyId.title: AWS Access Key ID
awsAccessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID for S3 authentication

awsSecretAccessKey.title: AWS Secret Access Key
awsSecretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key for S3 authentication

s3ForcePathStyle.title: S3 Force Path Style
s3ForcePathStyle.description: Force path-style URLs (required for Cloudflare R2, MinIO, and other S3-compatible services)
